reasoning: Your current limiter is lactate clearance, reflected by the 25W drop from your 5-min to 20-min power. Given your extended rest and recent ride at a lower intensity, we need to progressively challenge your aerobic base while gradually increasing stress. Emigration Canyon's steady gradient makes it a suitable simulation for the main climb in the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 x 6-minute intervals; 2 minutes at 201-218W, 4 minutes at 242-256W, 3-minute recovery between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
